title: bidens hyperborea
intro: Bidens hyperborea, also known as Northern Beggar's Lice, is a flowering plant species native to the Arctic tundra regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations and reducing fever, due to its salicylic acid content. Herbal preparations of Bidens hyperborea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
